creator: glarkin@FreeBSD.org
text:
-----BEGIN PGP SIGNED MESSAGE-----
Hash: SHA1

Hi Corky,

I'm working on your Beecrypt port update, and I have run into some
problems when OpenMP is enabled:

# make WITH_OPENMP=yes install clean
"Makefile", line 26: Need an operator
"Makefile", line 27: Need an operator
make: fatal errors encountered -- cannot continue

Can you provide a new Makefile to correct these errors?

Thank you,
Greg
- --
Greg Larkin

http://www.FreeBSD.org/           - The Power To Serve
http://www.sourcehosting.net/     - Ready. Set. Code.
http://twitter.com/sourcehosting/ - Follow me, follow you
